acquisition method: coupled to the Orbitrap Exploris 240 system, in DDA mode.
alkylation reagent: using iodoacetamide (50 mM) in ammonium bicarbonate (25 mM).
alkylation concentration: using iodoacetamide (50 mM) in ammonium bicarbonate (25 mM).
cleavage agent: followed by in-gel tryptic digestion with 1.5 to 2 μg trypsin.
enrichment method: using anti-methyllysine antibodies (Invitrogen, Cat. no: PA5-77770).
fragmentation method: using the Thermo Scientific Easy-nLC 1200 system coupled to the Q Exactive Plus Orbitrap system.
instrument: coupled to the Orbitrap Exploris 240 system.
labeling: using the Proteome Discoverer 2.4 software (label-free quantification).
reduction reagent: in-gel reduction using DTT (10 mM) in ammonium bicarbonate (25 mM).
reduction concentration: in-gel reduction using DTT (10 mM) in ammonium bicarbonate (25 mM).
